en: An oracle concerning Damascus. Behold, Damascus will cease to be a city and will become a heap of ruins.
zh: 關於大馬士革的默示： “看哪！大馬士革快要被廢棄， 不再是一個城市， 它必變作廢墟。

en: The cities of Aroer are deserted; they will be for flocks, which will lie down, and none will make them afraid.
zh: 亞羅珥的城市必被撇棄， 成為牧放羊群之處，羊群必在那裡躺臥， 沒有人驚擾牠們。

en: The fortress will disappear from Ephraim, and the kingdom from Damascus; and the remnant of Syria will be like the glory of the children of Israel, declares the LORD of hosts.
zh: 以法蓮的堡壘必失去， 大馬士革的國權也必消逝； 亞蘭的餘民 必像以色列人的榮耀一般消滅。” 這是萬軍之耶和華說的。

en: And in that day the glory of Jacob will be brought low, and the fat of his flesh will grow lean.
zh: “到那日，雅各的榮耀必衰落， 他肥胖的身體必消瘦。

en: And it shall be as when the reaper gathers standing grain and his arm harvests the ears, and as when one gleans the ears of grain in the Valley of Rephaim.
zh: 就像收割的人收聚莊稼， 用手割取穗子； 又像人在利乏音谷， 拾取遺落的穗子。

en: Gleanings will be left in it, as when an olive tree is beaten- two or three berries in the top of the highest bough, four or five on the branches of a fruit tree, declares the LORD God of Israel.
zh: 雖然其中有少許遺下的穗子，卻好像橄欖樹被打過一樣。 在樹頂上，只剩下兩三個果子； 在那本是多結果子的果樹枝上， 只留下四五個果子。” 這是耶和華以色列的 神說的。

en: In that day man will look to his Maker, and his eyes will look on the Holy One of Israel.
zh: 到那日，人必仰望他們的創造主， 他們必親眼看見以色列的聖者。

en: He will not look to the altars, the work of his hands, and he will not look on what his own fingers have made, either the Asherim or the altars of incense.
zh: 他們必不仰望自己雙手所做的祭壇， 也不再看著自己指頭所做的， 無論是亞舍拉，或是香壇。

en: In that day their strong cities will be like the deserted places of the wooded heights and the hilltops, which they deserted because of the children of Israel, and there will be desolation.
zh: 到那日，他們那些因以色列人而撇棄的堅固城， 必像樹林中和山頂上被撇棄的地方， 這樣，地就荒涼了。

en: For you have forgotten the God of your salvation and have not remembered the Rock of your refuge; therefore, though you plant pleasant plants and sow the vine-branch of a stranger,
zh: 因為你忘記了那拯救你的 神， 又不記念那作你避難所的磐石， 所以你雖然栽下佳美的樹秧子， 種下異種的幼苗，

en: though you make them grow on the day that you plant them, and make them blossom in the morning that you sow, yet the harvest will flee away in a day of grief and incurable pain.
zh: 又在你栽種的日子裡，細心地在周圍圈上籬笆， 到早晨，又使你所栽種的開花， 但在愁苦與極度傷痛的日子裡， 所收割的就只有一小堆。

en: Ah, the thunder of many peoples; they thunder like the thundering of the sea! Ah, the roar of nations; they roar like the roaring of mighty waters!
zh: 唉！許多民族在喧嘩， 他們喧嚷好像海浪澎湃； 列國在咆哮， 他們吼叫，好像洪水奔流。

en: The nations roar like the roaring of many waters, but he will rebuke them, and they will flee far away, chased like chaff on the mountains before the wind and whirling dust before the storm.
zh: 萬族怒號，好像眾水湧流， 但 神必斥責他們，使他們遠遠逃跑； 他們又被追趕，如同山上風前的糠秕， 又像暴風前的塵土捲動。

en: At evening time, behold, terror! Before morning, they are no more! This is the portion of those who loot us, and the lot of those who plunder us.
zh: 在晚上有驚恐， 未到早晨，他們就沒有了， 這是那些搶奪我們的人所得的分， 是那些掠劫我們的人應得的報應。
